**International friendlies saw some exciting action with notable performances from Wirtz and Van Dijk.**

## Context / Background
The international break has provided opportunities for teams to test their squads and strategies in friendlies. These matches offer a glimpse into the current form and potential of various national teams.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Player | Goals | Assists |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Wirtz | 2 | 2 |
| Van Dijk | 1 | 0 |

> The friendlies have shown that Wirtz is in great form, scoring a brace and providing two assists in Germany's win over Switzerland.

## What's Next?
The international friendlies will continue, with teams gearing up for more matches. The schedule is packed, and fans can expect more exciting performances from their favorite players.
